title: phyllostegia variabilis
intro: Phyllostegia variabilis, also known as the variable tree hyssop, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is native to Hawaii and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia variabilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
